channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Canadian news publishers sue OpenAI over alleged copyright infringement
item.description: A coalition of Canadian news publishers, including The Canadian Press, Torstar, Globe and Mail, Postmedia and CBC/Radio-Canada, has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI for using news content to train its ChatGPT generative artificial intelligence system.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Australian Parliament bans social media for under-16s with world-first law
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — A social media ban for children under 16 passed the Australian Parliament on Friday in a world-first law.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Canada sues Google over alleged anticompetitive practices in online ads
item.description: Canada’s antitrust watchdog is suing Google over alleged anticompetitive conduct in the tech giant’s online advertising business and wants the company to sell off two of its services and pay a penalty.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Muddy footprints suggest 2 species of early humans were neighbors in Kenya 1.5 million years ago
item.description: Muddy footprints left on a Kenyan lakeside suggest two of our early human ancestors were neighbors some 1.5 million years ago.
item.dc:creator: Christina Larson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Haberman says Zuckerberg's Mar-a-Lago visit a signal industry may be courting Trump
item.description: National political correspondent Maggie Haberman said Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg's recent visit to President-elect Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort may show that industries are seeking to build a bridge with Trump ahead of the inauguration, and not the other way around.
item.dc:creator: Steff Danielle Thomas, The Hill

item.title: Amazon’s VP explains how to protect yourself from holiday impersonation scams
item.description: Amazon becomes a prime target of scammers during the holiday shopping season trying to steal Social Security numbers, bank information and Amazon credentials.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 4 prerequisites for IT leaders to navigate today’s era of disruption
item.description: For its Generative AI Readiness Report, IT services company Avanade surveyed over 3,000 business and IT executives in 10 countries from companies with at least $500 million in annual revenue.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Las empresas que no se adapten a la IA generativa podrían poner en jaque su negocio
item.description: Cuatro de cada diez directivos aproximadamente (44,1%) considera que aquellas organizaciones que no se adapten a la nueva era de la inteligencia artificial (IA) generativa podría poner en jaque su negocio llegando, incluso, a condenarles a desaparecer.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Orange acuerda con OpenAI el acceso a sus modelos de IA antes de su lanzamiento
item.description: La inteligencia artificial (IA) ha ganado un protagonismo incontestable desde la irrupción de ChatGPT a manos de OpenAI.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How Biden’s AI tech could play a role in Trump’s immigration crackdown
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump will return to power next year with a raft of technological tools at his disposal that would help deliver his campaign promise of cracking down on immigration—among them, surveillance and artificial intelligence technology that the Biden administration already uses to he
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Uno Platform unveils visual designer for cross-platform .NET development
item.description: Uno Platform has unveiled the Uno Platform Studio, featuring a suite of developer productivity tools including Hot Design, a visual designer for building cross-platform .NET apps.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Kai Trump shows Elon Musk awkwardly tutoring Trump in rocket science
item.description: While Trump's aspiring influencer granddaughter happily shared video of her joining him at Musk's latest SpaceX launch, she also revealed moments of the president-elect looking 'out of depth' and 'intimidated.
item.dc:creator: Martha Ross, The Mercury News

item.title: Gov. Newsom sets himself up as a foil to Elon Musk and Donald Trump
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- As Elon Musk prepares to wield more power in Washington, the state where he built his fortune is girding for a fight.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Talk in 2 languages with Apple Watch's real-time translation
item.description: Apple Watch's Translate app gives you your own personal interpreter, allowing you to have live two-way conversations in up to 20 different languages.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Python to C: What’s new in Cython 3.1
item.description: Cython is the most convenient way to bridge C and Python languages and tools in Python programs. Developers use it to write C extensions or wrap C libraries for use in Python. Now, a major new release is on the way.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Australia’s lower House passes social media ban for under-16s
item.description: Communications Minister Michelle Rowland said the Senate would debate the bill later Wednesday. The major parties' support all but guarantees the legislation will pass in the Senate, where no party holds a majority of seats.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: How to (kindly) ask people not to post your kids' photos on social media
item.description: With kids facing a seemingly increasing amount of threats from creeps on the internet, here's how you can respectfully ask people not to post photos of your children on social media.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 10 ways AI can make farmers’ jobs easier
item.description: For those who work the earth, AI can be an invaluable tool for making that work more efficient, sustainable and productive. AI helps farmers use the same tools they have been using for centuries, but with improved efficiency and focus.
item.dc:creator: Richard Baguley, Fast Company

item.title: Julius is a great AI tool for analyzing and visualizing datasets
item.description: This article is republished with permission from Wonder Tools, a newsletter that helps you discover the most useful sites and apps. Subscribe here. Julius is a promising new AI service for analyzing data.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Caplan, Fast Company

item.title: Revolutionizing HR and payroll: Strategies for a modern workforce
item.description: Learn how agencies are innovating their payroll services to meet evolving needs The post Revolutionizing HR and payroll: Strategies for a modern workforce first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Interpol clamps down on cybercrime and arrests over 1,000 suspects in Africa
item.description: DAKAR, Senegal (AP) — Interpol arrested 1,006 suspects in Africa during a massive two-month operation, clamping down on cybercrime that left tens of thousands of victims, including some who were trafficked, and produced millions in financial damages, the global police organization said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: MARK BANCHEREAU, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Build generative AI pipelines without the infrastructure headache
item.description: While creating a basic ChatGPT prototype might take a weekend, developing production-ready generative AI systems that securely handle enterprise data presents significantly greater engineering challenges.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Is Outlook down? Thousands of Microsoft 365 users report outage issues
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Thousands of Microsoft 365 customers worldwide reported having issues with services like Outlook and Teams on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: CISA debuts new cybersecurity training platform
item.description: The new "CISA Learning" system will offer the same training to both internal staff and tens of thousands of external users. The post CISA debuts new cybersecurity training platform first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Roblox gives parents more control over kids' experience
item.description: Roblox, which has been downloaded millions of times, announced sweeping and restrictive settings for minor safety.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation
